description: Resolve case object asset intents into typed candidates, selected assets, or explicit analytic/proxy fallback reasons.
physical_assumptions: Physics-critical assets require collider, mass, rigid body, and collision profile.
Visual-only assets may be proxied without changing physics.
Asset fallback must be explicit and recorded.
verifier_rules: Physics-critical intents declare required physical properties.
Visual-only intents do not enter the physics graph.
Each unresolved intent records a fallback reason.
repair_suggestions: Build or update the asset physics index.
Use analytic proxy for smoke if real mesh is unavailable.
Keep selected asset and fallback reason in artifacts.
